Introduction
We study protein-ligand docking with a diffusion model that predicts binding poses and confidence.
Method
The framework alternates pose denoising, confidence calibration, and affinity-aware ranking.
Experiments
On docking benchmarks we outperform classical baselines on top-1 success rate and show robust ablations. Code is available at https://github.com/example/diffdock-today.
Conclusion
This is a practical docking paper with enough method and experiment substance.
